name: Feature request

labels: enhancement

**The problem you're trying to solve**

<!-- What inbox-management pain does this address? -->

**The change you'd like**

<!-- Concrete: a new flag, command, behavior. Show the desired CLI shape. -->

```
gmail-cleanup proposed-command --some-flag
```

**Alternatives you've considered**

<!-- "I could just use existing X" / "manually doing Y works but..." -->

**Why this belongs in gmail-cleanup vs. a separate tool**

<!-- The bar: does this match the project values in CONTRIBUTING.md? Safety, reversibility, small surface area. -->

**Anything else**

<!-- Edge cases, related issues, prior art. -->
